title: Create & FD Dough
description: Makes Create dough and Farmer's Delight wheat dough work interchangeably. Both doughs can be used in each other's recipes, with simple conversion recipes between them. Also adds FD dough support to Create's cake recipe and a new slimeball recipe.
body: Makes Create dough and Farmer's Delight wheat dough work interchangeably. Both doughs can be used in each other's recipes, with simple conversion recipes between them. Also adds FD dough support to Create's cake recipe and a new slimeball recipe.
